Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

def analyze\(path\):
    img = Image.open\(path\).convert\('RGBA'\)
    w, h = img.size
    name = os.path.basename\(path\)
    print\(f'{name}: {w}x{h}'\)
    for y in range\(h-1, -1, -1\):
        for x in range\(w\):
            if img.getpixel\(\(x, y\)\)[3] > 0:
                print\(f'  마지막 불투명 행: {y} / 하단 여백: {h-1-y}px'\)
                return
    print\('  모두 투명'\)

base = 'D:/Personal Project/Windows/monitoring/my-pet/src/assets'
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Run_Unarmed.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Idle_Unarmed.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Hurt.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Walk.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Idle.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Hurt.png'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

def analyze\(path\):
    img = Image.open\(path\).convert\('RGBA'\)
    w, h = img.size
    name = os.path.basename\(path\)
    print\(f'{name}: {w}x{h}'\)
    for y in range\(h-1, -1, -1\):
        for x in range\(w\):
            if img.getpixel\(\(x, y\)\)[3] > 0:
                print\(f'  last opaque row: {y} / bottom padding: {h-1-y}px'\)
                return
    print\('  all transparent'\)

base = 'D:/Personal Project/Windows/monitoring/my-pet/src/assets'
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Run_Unarmed.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Idle_Unarmed.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Skeleton_Default_Hurt.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Walk.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Idle.png'\)
analyze\(f'{base}/Zombie_Default_Hurt.png'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
src = r'C:\\Users\\jongc\\Downloads\\free-slime-mobs-pixel-art-top-down-sprite-pack\\PNG\\Slime2'
dst = r'D:\\Personal Project\\Windows\\monitoring\\my-pet\\src\\assets'
target_h = 40

for name, f, out in [
    \('idle','Idle/Slime2_Idle_full.png','Monster4_Idle.png'\),
    \('walk','Walk/Slime2_Walk_full.png','Monster4_Walk.png'\),
    \('hurt','Hurt/Slime2_Hurt_full.png','Monster4_Hurt.png'\),
    \('death','Death/Slime2_Death_full.png','Monster4_Death.png'\),
]:
    img = Image.open\(f'{src}/{f}'\).convert\('RGBA'\)
    pad = target_h - img.height
    new = Image.new\('RGBA', \(img.width, target_h\), \(0,0,0,0\)\)
    new.paste\(img, \(0, pad\)\)
    new.save\(f'{dst}/{out}'\)
    print\(f'{name}: {img.size} -> {new.size} \(top pad {pad}px\)'\)

run = Image.open\(f'{src}/Run/Slime2_Run_full.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)
run.save\(f'{dst}/Monster4_Run.png'\)
print\(f'run: {run.size} \(no change\)'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageOps
src = r'C:\\Users\\jongc\\Downloads\\Forest_Monsters_FREE\\Forest_Monsters_FREE\\Mushroom\\Mushroom with VFX'
dst = r'D:\\Personal Project\\Windows\\monitoring\\my-pet\\src\\assets'
fw = 80  # 560/7=80

def flip_frames\(img_path, out_path, frame_w\):
    img = Image.open\(img_path\).convert\('RGBA'\)
    h = img.height
    n = img.width // frame_w
    result = Image.new\('RGBA', \(img.width, h\), \(0,0,0,0\)\)
    for i in range\(n\):
        frame = img.crop\(\(i*frame_w, 0, \(i+1\)*frame_w, h\)\)
        flipped = ImageOps.mirror\(frame\)
        result.paste\(flipped, \(i*frame_w, 0\)\)
    result.save\(out_path\)
    print\(f'{out_path.split\(chr\(92\)\)[-1]}: {img.size}, {n} frames, flipped'\)

flip_frames\(f'{src}/Mushroom-Idle.png', f'{dst}/Monster6_Idle.png', fw\)
flip_frames\(f'{src}/Mushroom-Run.png', f'{dst}/Monster6_Run.png', fw\)
flip_frames\(f'{src}/Mushroom-Hit.png', f'{dst}/Monster6_Hurt.png', fw\)
flip_frames\(f'{src}/Mushroom-Stun.png', f'{dst}/Monster6_Stun.png', fw\)
")
